I always check the checklists. I sometimes send documents. I never work on Sundays.

Hi Carlos. I have a quick question. What do you do at Sucafina every week?
On Mondays, I check the farm checklists. I also verify supplier compliance every month.
Do you attend meetings with the Rwanda team?
Yes, I often attend the alignment call on Zoom. Then I report the results to my manager.
And your manager? What does she do?
She reviews the reports and sends feedback to the team.
Do you write the documents in English alone?
Not yet. I do not write long documents alone, but I send short messages every day.

Here is my week at Sucafina. On Mondays, I check the farm checklists. I verify supplier compliance every month, and I always report the results to my manager. I often attend alignment meetings with the Rwanda team on Zoom. I sometimes send documents to the Switzerland office. I do not write long documents in English alone yet, but I try every day. My manager reviews the reports, and she sends feedback to the team. This is my normal week.

Hi Carlos, this is Emma with a quick note about our team. We usually start the week with a short meeting. On Tuesdays, the Rwanda team sends the farm checklists, and you verify the numbers. I often review the reports, and I send feedback to everyone. We rarely meet on Fridays, so keep that day for the farm visits. Please attend the alignment call on Wednesday. Thank you, and have a good week.

On Mondays, Carlos checks the farm checklists. He verifies supplier compliance. He attends a meeting with the Rwanda team. He reports the results to his manager. His manager reviews the report and sends feedback.
